quizzes.title: Android & Kotlin Skills Assessment
quizzes.description: Initial quiz to identify your knowledge level in syntax, logic, and Android fundamentals.

questions.text: Which keyword declares an immutable variable in Kotlin?
Which type represents a nullable String in Kotlin?
What is the correct Kotlin entry point function?
How do you use string templates in Kotlin?
What is the primary purpose of a 'Data Class' in Kotlin?
options: To hold data with automatically generated equals/hashCode/toString

questions.text: Which scope is used to launch a coroutine that should live as long as the Activity is active?
In Android, which component is used to share data between different applications?
What does the 'Elvis Operator' (?:) do in Kotlin?
options: It checks if a value is true
It returns the left-hand value if it's NOT null, otherwise the right-hand value

questions.text: Which Jetpack library is recommended for managing complex UI navigation?
What is a 'Higher-Order Function' in Kotlin?
options: A function that must be called from a class
A function that takes another function as a parameter or returns one
A function with a high priority in execution
A function that doesn't return any value
